lane: MiMo V2.5 JANGTQ_2 live media/tools/cache proof after vision head-dim source parity fix
source_commits_required_before_run: 51477f05 Match MiMo vision qk head default

chat_text_exact.failure: literal hyphen dropped before parser or JSON repair can matter

image_icon.boundary: image transport, preserved vision weights, and logo text recognition passed for this simple image

video_red.prompt: What is the dominant color? Answer with one word.
video_red.failure: video payload routed but visual semantic answer is wrong for the red fixture

audio_default.output:
The user wants me to transcribe the audio into a short phrase.

The audio contains a voice saying "I'm fine" followed by a sound effect.

The phrase is "I'm fine".

I'll provide the transcription.
audio_default.boundary: audio decoded and heard the phrase, but visible planning/prose leaked and exact terse transcription is not proven

audio_no_think.output: I'm sorry, but I cannot transcribe the audio because no audio file was provided in your message. Please upload or attach the audio file so I can help you transcribe it.
audio_no_think.failure: request/log path routed audio, but model/runtime output denied receiving audio under explicit no-thinking request

chat_required_tool.boundary: OpenAI tool-call structure is valid, but semantic literal exactness fails

responses_required_tool_stream.boundary: Responses streaming event shape, argument delta/done, final object order, and output indices are valid for this run; model exactness still mutates the value

cache_proof.boundary: same-process paged/native MiMo cache hit is proven; block-disk L2 write and fresh-process restore were not enabled or proven in this launch

proven: Current source loaded the MiMo V2.5 JANGTQ_2 bundle after the head-dim parity fix.
Preserved visual/audio/speech media tensors were bound into the runtime.
Simple image text recognition returned vMLX.
Video and audio payloads reached the media runtime path.

Responses required-tool stream emitted valid message/function_call output indices 0/1 plus argument delta and done events.
Responses nonstream usage reported paged cache reuse.
Native MiMo mixed-SWA cache schema and paged same-process reuse were active.
Generic TurboQuant KV was not substituted for MiMo asymmetric SWA.
not_proven: MiMo literal exactness remains red: MIMO-OK became MIMOOK and blue-cat became blue cat.
Red video semantic answer remains red: model answered White.
Audio exactness/hygiene remains red: default output leaked planning prose and no-thinking output denied receiving audio.
Block-disk L2 write and fresh-process restore were not proven in this launch.
Auto-tool, no-tool, tool-result continuation, cancellation cleanup, largest-context tail, UI, installed-app, package, signing, notarization, and release clearance remain open.
other_agent_instructions: Do not mark MiMo media or exactness green from this proof.
Do not add parser-side semantic repair, tool-argument rewriting, prompt-only folding, or hidden sampling overrides to hide these MiMo exactness failures.
Next MiMo work should compare artifact/logit/quant contract or runtime decode behavior, especially why preserved media routing still fails red video and exact literals.
If L2 is required for MiMo, relaunch with explicit block-disk L2 settings and prove fresh-process restore separately.
Installed app must be rebuilt from a source containing 51477f05 before any MiMo UI/installed-app proof is meaningful.
